nodes.name: 赞比亚
nodes.summary: 赞比亚是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联182种鸟类，包括南非鸭、Western crested guinea fowl、White-throated francolin等182种鸟类，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

nodes.name: 鸟纲
nodes.summary: 鸟纲（Aves）是图谱中的分类级分类节点，当前关联10767种鸟类，如丹顶鹤、朱鹮、中华秋沙鸭等10767种鸟类。

nodes.name: Oustalet's sunbird
nodes.summary: Oustalet's sunbird (Cinnyris oustaleti) is a species of bird in the family Nectariniidae. It is found in Angola, Malawi, Tanzania, and Zambia. References
nodes.shortSummary: Oustalet's sunbird (Cinnyris oustaleti) is a species of bird in the family Nectariniidae. It is found in Angola, Malawi, Tanzania, and Zamb…
